name: Automa Chrome GUI Environment with Ansible
postCreateCommand: git lfs install && chown -R root:root /workspace && python3 -m pip install pymongo python-dotenv psycopg2-binary>=2.9 pandas>=1.0 && mkdir -p /workspace/chrome_profile && chmod -R 777 /workspace/chrome_profile && chown -R root:root /workspace/chrome_profile && if [ ! -d '/workspace/automa' ]; then git clone https://github.com/AutomaApp/automa.git /workspace/automa && cd /workspace/automa && mkdir -p src/utils && echo "export default function() { return 'automa-codespaces'; }" > src/utils/getPassKey.js && pnpm install && pnpm build; fi && mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && ansible --version
